---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for OpenSignals Protocol
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution in detail. How would this feature work?

## Alternative Solutions

Have you considered any alternative solutions or features? If so, describe them here.

## Component Affected

Which component(s) would this feature affect?
- [ ] Protocol specification (specs/)
- [ ] JSON schemas (schemas/)
- [ ] Reference implementation (reference-implementation/)
- [ ] Examples (examples/)
- [ ] Integration documentation (integrations/)
- [ ] Documentation (docs/)
- [ ] API endpoints
- [ ] Trust scoring model
- [ ] Policy framework
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Example Use Case

Provide a concrete example of how this feature would be used:

### Current Workflow (Without Feature)
```
Describe current workflow
```

### Proposed Workflow (With Feature)
```
Describe proposed workflow
```

## Schema / API Changes

If applicable, provide example schemas or API changes:

```json
{
  "example_schema_or_api": "here"
}
```

## Implementation Considerations

Are there any implementation challenges or considerations?

- **Backward Compatibility**: Will this break existing implementations?
- **Performance**: Any performance implications?
- **Security**: Any security considerations?
- **Complexity**: How complex is this feature to implement?

## Real-World Impact

Who would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Signal providers
- [ ] Demand-side platforms (DSPs)
- [ ] Agencies and buyers
- [ ] Brands
- [ ] Governance systems
- [ ] All stakeholders
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Priority

How important is this feature?
- [ ] Critical - Needed for protocol to be viable
- [ ] High - Significantly improves protocol utility
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have, improves user experience
- [ ] Low - Minor enhancement

## Related Issues / Discussions

Link to any related issues or discussions:
- #issue_number
- Discussion link

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, diagrams, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I am willing to submit a pull request for this feature
- [ ] I can help with documentation
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can provide feedback during development
- [ ] I need someone else to implement this

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided a clear description of the feature
- [ ] I have explained the problem this feature solves
- [ ] I have described the proposed solution
- [ ] I have considered backward compatibility
- [ ] I have identified affected components
